// THE REPAIR PROMISE / EST. 2019

Repair, don't
replace.

Send any Forge item back, any year you bought it. We resole, restitch, rewax, rewax-zip-and-rebuckle, and ship it home — included on every order, forever.

Run a kit? Send the whole kit. Inherited a pair from your uncle? Send 'em. Bought 'em secondhand from a guy on Craigslist? Still works.

SEND IT IN →
01 — SOLE
VIBRAM XS RESOLE.

Original XS pattern, original last. Returns in 14 days.

02 — STITCH
SEAM RESTITCH.

Major seams re-bartacked with the same gauge we built it with.

03 — WAX
REWAX + DWR.

Cold-applied beeswax. Restores water-shedding to factory.

04 — ZIP
YKK SWAP.

Original YKK Excella replaced like-for-like, gunmetal finish.

REPAIR FOR LIFE — SEND ANY ITEM, ANY YEAR FREE GROUND SHIPPING / ORDERS $120+ FREE RESOLE AT MILE 400

SEARCH SIGN IN CART [3]
SHOP  /  FOOTWEAR  /  ALPINE BOOTS  /  MERIDIAN GTX
FRAME 01 / 06 · STUDIO
● FIELD-TESTED 3,400+ MI
// CONSTRUCTION

Built for the
tenth season.

01 — UPPER

2.4mm full-grain leather from a Bavarian tannery, vegetable-tanned, vegetable-finished. One panel per quarter — no glued seams, no overlay tricks.

02 — MEMBRANE

GORE-TEX Performance Comfort, glued and taped. WP 28,000mm. Breathable to 18,000 RET, tested between 1,400 and 4,800m.

03 — SOLE

VIBRAM XS Trek Evo, 8mm directional lugs. Stitch-down construction so we can resole without damaging the upper — and we will, free, at mile 400.

04 — MIDSOLE

Twin-density PU rockplate over EVA. Doesn't compact like foam. Five years of testing — same midsole, same boot, same shape.

05 — LACE

Round 4mm braided polyester, four-stage lock. Replacement laces ship free for the life of the boot — request from the repair desk.

06 — LAST

Wide toe-box (D+) on a low-volume forefoot. Designed for actual feet — splayed, sweaty, swollen by mile 14.

// TECH SHEET

// FIVE YEARS OF TESTING

Same boot,
five generations.

GEN 01 · 2020
v1.0

Heel slip on descent. Resole pattern wore irregularly past 600 mi.

GEN 02 · 2021
v1.4

Heel cup re-tooled. Asymmetric lug, fixed irregular wear.

GEN 03 · 2023
v2.0

Stitch-down construction adopted. Resole pipeline officially free.

GEN 04 · 2024
v2.8

Wide toe-box added. D+ becomes standard, NX last retired.

GEN 05 · 2026
v3.2

Current. K. Reyes runs 800 mi on a single resole. Production line stable.

K. REYES
JMT THRU-HIKE · 807 MI · SIZE 8W
★★★★★

807 miles on one resole. The boot weighed 8g less at the end than the beginning — that's two grams of leather and six of dirt I never managed to clean out. The free resole at mile 400 wasn't a marketing thing; it actually showed up at trail town.

M. KARASEK
DOLOMITES · 14 SEASONS · SIZE 10.5
★★★★★

I've owned the Meridian since v1.4. They've fixed everything I asked about — and they remember which v I'm on when I send a repair. I'll keep buying these as long as Forge keeps making them.

A. NIEMINEN
LAPLAND · DAY HIKE · SIZE 7
★★★★☆

Knocked one off because the laces are very long for a size 7 — could ship a shorter pair as default. Otherwise the boot is unimpeachable. Walked from Kilpisjärvi to Treriksröset and didn't think about my feet once.

// FIELD NOTES / EST. 2019

A journal,
field-first.

Field tests, build journals, route notes and the occasional argument about lug depth. Written by our team, our testers, and the people who ship our packs back to us for repair. Every other Wednesday — no marketing emails between.

// FIELD LOG 04 · FEATURED · 12 MIN READ

800 miles
on a single resole.

K. Reyes thru-hiked the John Muir Trail in 21 weeks on a single pair of Meridian GTX. We sent a resole to mile 412 by mail. She finished at mile 807. Here are her notes, sole maps from miles 100, 400 and 800, the gear list, and the part where she lost a sock to a marmot.

AUTHOR
K. Reyes
DATE
May 24, 2026
RATED FOR
Alpine · Sierras

// THE REPAIR PROMISE / EST. 2019

Repair, don't
replace.

Send any Forge item back, any year you bought it. We resole, restitch, rewax, re-zip and re-buckle — free, included on every order, forever. We've done a hundred and twenty thousand of them.

START A REPAIR → HOW IT WORKS
120,400+
ITEMS REPAIRED SINCE 2019
$0
CHARGED TO THE CUSTOMER, EVER
14 d
AVERAGE TURNAROUND, IN-OUT
∞
YEARS YOU CAN SEND
// 01 — WHAT WE FIX

Eight things,
any day, any year.

EVERYTHING ELSE — JUST ASK
01 — SOLE

Resole.

Original VIBRAM XS pattern. Last reused. Returns to factory grip in 14 days.

FREE · 14-DAY TURN
02 — SEAM

Restitch.

Main seams re-bartacked with the original thread gauge and color we shipped.

FREE · 7-DAY TURN
03 — WAX + DWR

Rewax.

Cold-applied beeswax + new DWR. Restores water-shedding to factory spec.

FREE · 10-DAY TURN
04 — YKK

Re-zip.

YKK Excella swap, like-for-like, gunmetal finish. Pull replaced too.

FREE · 12-DAY TURN
05 — BUCKLE

Re-buckle.

ITW Nexus side-release buckles, swap or repair. Field-installable if you'd rather.

FREE · 5-DAY TURN
06 — STRAP

Re-strap.

Compression strap, shoulder pad, hipbelt — replaced like-for-like.

FREE · 8-DAY TURN
07 — PATCH

Patch.

Heat-bonded patches on shells and packs, original fabric where we still have it.

FREE · 6-DAY TURN
08 — WEIRD

Anything weird.

Marmot chewed your strap. Dog ate the lace. Send it. Email a photo first.

CASE-BY-CASE · ASK FIRST
// 02 — HOW IT WORKS

Four steps,
fourteen days.

01
START

Tell us what's broken.

Fill in the form below. Upload a photo or four. We'll write back within 48 hours with a prepaid shipping label.

+ 0 DAYS
02
SHIP

Send it in. Free shipping.

Box it, tape the label, drop it at the carrier. No cleaning required — we'd rather see the wear. Tracking comes to your email.

+ 2 – 5 DAYS
03
REPAIR

We do the work.

Resole, restitch, rewax, re-buckle. Photographed before and after. Live updates as it moves through the bench.

+ 5 – 14 DAYS
04
RETURN

Back in the field.

Ships home free. Comes with a one-page repair card detailing what we did and what we noticed about the wear pattern.

+ 14 D TOTAL · ON US
// 03 — START A REPAIR

// FROM THE BENCH

// 04 — FROM THE BENCH

Recently repaired.

28 IN THE QUEUE TODAY
MERIDIAN GTX · v2.0 2021 · J. PARK

Resole + restitch after 1,400 miles.

Original VIBRAM XS replaced. Welt restitched. Wax. Back on the trail in 9 days.

RIDGE 28L · v1.4 2020 · T. AKANDE

Shoulder strap re-stitched (marmot).

Marmot chewed through strap webbing at 11,000 ft. Replaced like-for-like. 7-day turn.

MERIDIAN SHELL · v2.2 2022 · M. KARASEK

Pit-zip replaced + full rewax.

YKK Excella swap. Cold-wax. DWR restored. Five-season shell, year six.

// 05 — STUFF WE GET ASKED

FAQ.

Is it actually free, or is there shipping? −

Actually free, including both shipping legs. We send you the inbound label, we ship it home on us. No fees, no parts charges, no "consumables." If we had to charge for parts, this wouldn't be a repair program — it'd be a sale.

Do I need the original receipt? +

No. If it has the Forge stamp, we'll repair it — even if you bought it secondhand, inherited it, or found it. We do ask for a year and a vague model so we know which parts to stock for the bench.

How many times can I repair the same item? +

As many times as you want. The Bend repair desk has resoled one customer's Meridian eight times. They're still in service. We will tell you, kindly, if a boot is genuinely past being saved — and offer a discount on a new pair if so.

What if I bought it from a different store? +

Same deal. We don't care where you bought it. We care that we made it.

Can I just buy the parts and repair it myself? +

Yes. We sell field repair kits for most products at cost — buckles, straps, laces, patch fabric, beeswax, a YKK pull set. Available in any of our stores or by mail.

Where do the worn-out parts go? +

VIBRAM XS soles go back to VIBRAM for grinding and reuse. Leather offcuts go to a small bookbinder in Portland. Webbing and buckles get sorted and reused for prototypes. We landfill almost nothing — we'll send a report if you ask.
